config.name: ICU_USE_CONFIGURATIONS
config.note: When enabled the user must provide a variable named @p icu_configurations of type @p icu_configurations_t.

macro.name: _icu_isr_invoke_cb
macro.param: Pointer to the ICU driver instance.

typedef.name: hal_icu_driver_c
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an ICU driver.

typedef.name: hal_icu_config_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an ICU configuration.

typedef.name: ICUDriver
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an ICU driver (legacy).

typedef.name: ICUConfig
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an ICU configuration (legacy).

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ icu_lld_config_fields;

field.name: cfgsnum
field.brief: Number of configurations in the open array.

field.name: width
field.brief: Latest captured pulse width in ticks.

field.name: period
field.brief: Latest captured cycle period in ticks.

field.name: enabled_events
field.brief: Mask of the enabled ICU events.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ icu_lld_driver_fields;

method.name: icuStartCaptureI
icuWaitCapture
icuStopCaptureI
icuEnableEventsI
icuEnableEvents
icuDisableEventsI
icuDisableEvents
icuEnableNotifications
method.brief: Enables ICU notifications for all event kinds.

method.name: icuEnableNotificationsI
method.brief: Enables ICU notifications for all event kinds.

method.name: icuAreNotificationsEnabledX
method.brief: Checks if ICU notifications are enabled.

method.name: icuGetWidthX
method.brief: Returns the latest captured pulse width.

method.name: icuGetPeriodX
method.brief: Returns the latest captured cycle period.

method.name: icuGetEventsX
method.brief: Returns the cached ICU event flags.

method.name: icuGetAndClearEventsX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached ICU event flags.
method.param: Mask of events to be returned and cleared.
